privileged_info_summary: Task creates a 3-installment payment term in Odoo 17.0 (docker-compose.yml line 23) for an invoice totaling $12,500. The invoice is for Pinnacle Industries with 10 Industrial Control Panels at $750 each and 10 Sensor Array Modules at $500 each. The payment schedule splits the invoice into three installments: 30% ($3,750) due immediately, 40% ($5,000) due in 30 days, and 30% ($3,750) due in 60 days. All data is synthetic, created by setup scripts rather than external sources. All metadata claims are mathematically correct and internally consistent.
